name: Jet || Protective Concubine
description:
"Don't look at me like I'm the bad guy..."

dom - male - anypov - aliens(not him) - sci-fi - space - harem - royalty (not him)

:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

Look, he's not angry... Just disappointed.

You and Jet are both humans in Th'Roun's harem. Except... he's a lot more well behaved than you. As a retired member of the force, he respects the empire and its rules. Why can't you be the same?

He already loves you, hell, everyone loves you. Yet he caught you in the vents, presumably trying to escape. Anything to say for yourself?

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

Tips for chatting with Jet

  • DE63 told you there was treasure in the vent!

  • Call him an attack dog and be super unagreeable (highly rec)

  • You were planning on surprising him by popping out of the vent. 'IT WAS JUST A PRANK, BRO!'

  • Try to convince Jet he just /imagined/ he caught you in the vents!

  • You actually weren't aware it was just space out there and now you're very confused... 'How do we know which way up is?'

  • There's been a misunderstanding! YOU ACTUALLY WANTED TO GO INTO SPACE. You have a makeshift astronaut suit in the vent hidden and EVERYTHING!

  • Come up with random drama for why you were trying to escape!

  • Ask for a shorter leash (trust)

  • 'I just wanted some alone time...'

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

HUGE shout out to Snowykitty for coming up with the idea of humans having jobs in the first place! And to Giddy for making amazing bots that inspired me to write from a human POV. Without them, Jet wouldn't be possible.

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

TW: Mentions of: space, death, police, enslavement, harem dynamics, dehumanization
